stories.title: Aaron Judge on IL with Right Rib Stress Fracture — Out 4-6 Weeks

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge is on the IL with a rib stress fracture.

The three-time AL MVP is out 4–6 weeks — likely through at least August and possibly the Aug. 3 trade deadline.

New York's AL East lead gets much smaller today. #Yankees

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Judge's 20 HRs, potential 5th career 50-HR season, and AL MVP candidacy — all on hold.

New York recalled Spencer Jones from Triple-A to fill the void.

The Yankees will find out a lot about the rest of this roster over the next six weeks. #Yankees #MLB

article.headline: Aaron Judge on IL with Rib Stress Fracture — Yankees Lose Their Best Player Through At Least August

stories.title: Giants 18, Cubs 3 — Seven Home Runs at Wrigley

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Giants hit SEVEN home runs in Friday's 18-3 demolition of the Cubs at Wrigley.

Matt Chapman: grand slam + 3-run shot = 7 RBI.
Willy Adames: 2 HRs.
Casey Schmitt: 2 HRs.

San Francisco's offense just sent a message to the NL. #SFGiants

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
18-3. At Wrigley. Seven home runs.

The Giants have the most dangerous lineup in the NL when it's clicking — and Friday it clicked.

Matt Chapman with 7 RBI on a grand slam and a 3-run shot. That's a career day. #SFGiants #MLB

article.headline: Matt Chapman Hits a Grand Slam and a Three-Run Shot as Giants Blast Cubs 18-3 with Seven Home Runs at Wrigley

stories.title: Cristopher Sanchez's 50.2 Scoreless Innings — The Phillies Record That Stood 115 Years Is Gone

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Cristopher Sánchez broke Grover Cleveland Alexander's 115-year-old Phillies scoreless innings record — then kept going.

The streak reached 50.2 innings, the 5th longest in MLB history since 1893. A Hall of Famer's franchise record, erased. #Phillies

article.headline: Sanchez Passes Alexander: 50.2 Scoreless Innings Is the 5th Longest Run in MLB History Since 1893

stories.title: The Skubal Deadline — Tigers Must Decide As Contenders Circle

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Tigers are 6-21 since May 4. Tarik Skubal is targeting a June return.

Every contender knows what's coming: a two-time AL Cy Young winner potentially on the trade block.

The 2026 deadline is already being called "The Skubal Deadline." #Tigers #MLB

article.headline: The Skubal Deadline: Detroit's 6-21 Collapse Sets Up the Most Important Trade Decision of the Summer

stories.title: The AL East Race Just Changed — Judge's Injury Opens the Door

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge is on the IL. The Red Sox beat the Yankees 5-2 on Friday.

The AL East race just got a lot more interesting. Tampa Bay, Boston, and Toronto are all watching — and waiting.

Six weeks to see who seizes the moment. #MLB #ALEast

article.headline: Judge on the IL, Red Sox Win Friday: The AL East Race Just Got Wide Open
